name: Hotel Manager Simulator
short_description: Build and run your own hotel from the ground up. Manage guests, design rooms, hire staff and upgrade floors. Set competitive prices for rooms and turn the tiny 1-floor building into a thriving 100-story luxury hotel.
detailed_description:
Hotel Manager Simulator is an immersive management game where you build and run your very own hotel in the heart of the city. Begin with a small, rundown 1-floor building and grow it into a towering 100-story luxury hotel!

Build, Expand & Design Your Dream Hotel

You’re the boss. Design your hotel from the ground up, expand floor by floor, and decorate each room with fully customizable furniture. Purchase items ranging from Budget to Luxury and upgrade your facilities to increase your hotel rating, attract more guests, and boost your profits.

Manage Guests & Keep Them Happy

Running a hotel isn’t easy! Work the reception desk, answer room-service phone calls, solve guest issues, and maintain a high popularity rating. Happy guests mean better reviews—and more income to fuel your next big expansion.

Your Front-Desk Computer Is the Control Center

Use your in-game computer to manage every aspect of the business:

  • Manage rooms and reservations

  • Upgrade and expand the hotel

  • Hire employees

  • Purchase furniture & supplies

  • Run marketing campaigns

  • Apply for loans

  • Play fun mini-games

Decorate With Style

Browse the online furniture store and customize your hotel with a huge selection of items. Higher-grade furniture lets you charge more per room and helps build your hotel's star rating all the way to 5 Stars.

Relax After a Long Day

Need a break from managing the hotel? Unwind and enjoy some classic games right from your hotel computer.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America

reviews.review_text:
Very well made game, there were some bugs upon release but immediately got taken care of after mentioning it in the discord. The developer is very active and engaged in improving the game. About the gameplay: Its very enjoyable, it can be a little time consuming at some points but the time skipping with the rest fixes that problem. There is alot more content found in the game than what you would expect from a hotel simulator. 
Overall solid game i would give it a 9/10 very much worth the money.

Great game, really fun to play. Lot of potential here. Early access is what it is with any game but this is playable. The bones are there and I know the devs are working hard to crush bugs as they come up. They have been very active with updates and on the discord since day one. The base game is fun and so are the mini games. Worth it for sure.
Game is very buggy, no way to edit things once they are placed. Game could be fun but most of the things are broken.
